text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: kai

Log:
  x11-themes/plata-theme: Update to 0.8.3

  While I'm here:
  * Order variables a bit according to the PHB (moved USE_GNOME to USES block
    and placed PORTDOCS above the options block)

  Changelog:

  * Rewrote GtkPopover's stand-alone flat GtkEntry selectors (Gtk 3.2x/4.0).
  * Rewrote key color definitions (Gtk 2.0).

  https://gitlab.com/tista500/plata-theme/tags/0.8.3

  PR:		238244
  Submitted by:	Hiroki Tagato <tagattie@yandex.com> (maintainer)
